title: A weekend in the countryside
explanation:
A weekend in the countryside

Last weekend, Emma and her husband drove to the Lake District. They stayed in a small bed and breakfast near a lake. On Saturday they walked for hours and took photos of the mountains. It rained on Sunday morning, so they visited a local museum instead. The food at the B&B was excellent and the owners were very friendly. Emma said it was the most relaxing weekend of the year.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Emma thought the weekend was very [*relaxing|stressful|boring].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read and choose the correct option.

questions.text: They ____ to the Lake District. | *drove | flew | walked
On Saturday they took ____ of the mountains. | *photos | food | buses
Because of rain they visited a ____. | *museum | mountain | lake
The ____ at the B&B were friendly. | *owners | mountains | photos

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The text is about a [*short trip|job interview|shopping trip].
